speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2014 Wrangler Sport is the real deal. Bulletproof 3.6L V6, 4x4 trail-rated, removable top and doors for summer fun. Previous owner took meticulous care of it, and at $19,995, this one won't last the weekend. You looking for an adventure rig?

text: Thanks! An adventure rig sounds great. Has it been in any accidents? And do you have service records available?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — and I love that you're doing your homework! This Wrangler has a clean title, no accidents reported on the Carfax. It's been a one-owner vehicle, and that owner was religious about maintenance. I've got service records showing regular oil changes, tire rotations, the whole nine yards. The 3.6L Pentastar in these things is known to run well past 200,000 miles with basic upkeep, and this one's been treated right. Want me to grab those service records so you can take a look while you check it out?
